svg.title: UML Class Diagram — COEP System
svg.desc: Complete UML class diagram showing all classes, attributes, methods, and relationships for the COEP academic system including User hierarchy, services, controllers, and domain objects.
svg.text: Relationships: ──▷ Generalization ──◆ Composition ──◇ Aggregation ──> Association - - -> Dependency
Generalization (Inheritance): User ▷ Student, Teacher, Admin, ExamCellStaff
Aggregation: CourseService ◇─ Course * | QuizService ◇─ Quiz, QuizAttempt, QuizQuestion
Aggregation: ExamService ◇─ ExamForm, Result | AssignmentService ◇─ Assignment, Submission
Association: Controllers ─> respective User subclasses (1 to 1)
Dependency: All Services - -> CSVHandler | Controllers - -> Services
